description: Committed deployed-default reference for the fed-causal hosted tool: the default summary the backend serves, plus the known-CAR recovery and the pure-noise honest-null numbers. Regenerate with scripts/build_reference.py.

pure_noise_honest_null.verdict_rationale: Not tradable: the FOMC move is cross-sectional heterogeneity, not a placebo-robust tradable alpha — failing placebo-percentile significance, HAC-robust mean CAR, multiple-testing survival across the full grid, a net-of-cost tradable DiD spread.

summary.verdict_rationale: Not tradable: the FOMC move is cross-sectional heterogeneity, not a placebo-robust tradable alpha — failing a net-of-cost tradable DiD spread.
